commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The remaining action is contributor proof refresh plus maintainer judgment on stack order and MXC availability strategy, not an autonomous repair.; Cleared: No concrete supply-chain or secret-handling regression was found in the diff, but the command containment and MXC dependency changes remain maintainer-visible security-boundary risk. commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the MXC SDK to 0.7.0, adds explicit Windows build/UBR support for processcontainer on 26200.8728 and 26300.8289, adjusts system.run shell/env/fallback behavior, updates Sandbox diagnostics, and extends related tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this is a PR for a new Windows build/MXC SDK support path. Source inspection does show current main lacks the 0.7.0 SDK bump and 26200.8728 gate.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is contributor proof refresh plus maintainer judgment on stack order and MXC availability strategy, not an autonomous repair.
